Replace _includes/about.md
1   |-<<<<<<< HEAD
2   |-I am a sixth PhD candidate at the [Paul G. Allen School of Computer Science & Engineering](https://www.cs.washington.edu/) at The University of Washington, where I am advised by [Tim Althoff](http://www.timalthoff.com/). I am affiliated with [UW NLP](https://twitter.com/uwnlp).
3   |-
4   |- Previously, I was a Student Researcher at [Google Research](https://research.google/), an ML Research Intern at [Apple Health AI](https://machinelearning.apple.com/work-with-us) and a data scientist and the second full-time employee at [HealthRhythms](https://www.healthrhythms.com). 
5   |-=======
6 1 | I am a Postdoctoral Researcher at Stanford CS.
7 2 |

steps.message:
Update Todos
[x] Inspect repo state and reflog to identify the lost detached-HEAD commit
[x] Merge the lost commit into master and resolve any conflicts by keeping the detached-HEAD changes
[x] Verify the lost commit is in master history and the working tree is cleanRecovered and merged your lost detached-HEAD commit into master.

What I found:
• Lost commit in reflog: 645b8f3 — Move to Stanford
• It was made before checking out master, so it became unreachable from any branch

What I did:
• Merged 645b8f3 into master
• Resolved the conflict in _includes/about.md by keeping the detached-HEAD      
  version, which now says:
    ◦ I am a Postdoctoral Researcher at Stanford CS.

Verification:
• git merge-base --is-ancestor 645b8f3 master → MERGED
• Recent history:
    ◦ 9b9cd10 Merge commit '645b8f3'
    ◦ 645b8f3 Move to Stanford
    ◦ d7d3e4b off the job market woo

One note:
• The working tree is not fully clean because there is an untracked file:
    ◦ AGENTS.md

So your recovered changes are safely in master, but git status is not clean due to that unrelated untracked file. If you want, I can also help inspect whether AGENTS.md should be kept, ignored, or removed.
